name: Fun Hour
overview: Anatoly Potekhin is an elite organizer of the most grandiose and exclusive events in Moscow, able to arrange a celebration even in the middle of the desert. But when two large–scale orders coincide on the same day - a wedding ceremony in the Maldives and a banquet after the Russian–Chinese negotiations - he is forced to look for an unconventional solution. As a result, Tolya decides to go to the islands himself, and instead of himself to Moscow, he calls his twin brother Alyosha, who looks exactly like him.
